title: pombalia potosina var. potosina
intro: Pombalia potosina var. potosina, also known as Pombalia, is a plant species belonging to the family Sapindaceae. It is a shrub native to Venezuela, primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, thanks to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. Pombalia can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health benefits.
